rules.rule: Floating-point comparisons in 2D geometry must use precision-aware utilities from src/2d/lib/precision.ts. Never use exact equality (===) for geometric values. Use toBeCloseTo() in tests.
Use vector operations from src/2d/lib/vectorOperations.ts for 2D math. Don't reimplement dot product, cross product, normalization, etc.
Blueprint operations should follow the functional pattern in blueprintFns.ts. CompoundBlueprint handles multi-contour shapes. Boolean2D operations handle winding rules.
